name: English
hero.subtitle: A boutique homestead on 8 hectares in Kukowo (Masurian Hills) — three ponds, wooden cottages, old stable, sauna, kayaks and bikes included. Lanterns light up the magic after dark.
intro.label: A homestead with character
intro.lead: Konradówka is 8 hectares of calm in Kukowo. Three ponds with piers, old wood, hammocks in the trees, and the magic of lanterns after sunset.
intro.text: Three types of stay: wooden 75 sqm cottages with fireplaces, 45 sqm studios in a restored stable, and a camper site. Kayaks and bikes included. Fishing from the terrace.
feature1.title: Three ponds on site
feature1.text: Private ponds with piers right outside — kayaking, fishing, sunrise views over the water.
feature2.title: 8 hectares of space
feature2.text: Large grounds — even with other guests around, you won't feel crowded. Hammocks, campfire, BBQ.
feature3.title: Kayaks and bikes included
feature3.text: Far from resort crowds. At night you hear the forest.
feature4.title: Sauna, trampolines, campfire
feature4.text: On-site sauna, children's playground with trampolines, BBQ zones, campfire. And lanterns after dark.
oferta.label: What we offer
offer.chaty.label: Offer 01
offer.chaty.title: Konradowe Cottages
offer.chaty.lead: 75 sqm wooden cottages with fireplace, terrace and direct access to the pond. Two bedrooms, up to 6 people.
offer.stajnia.label: Offer 02
offer.stajnia.title: Studios in the Old Stable
offer.stajnia.lead: Two-story 45 sqm studios in a restored stable — original wood, modern comfort, intimate feel.
offer.kamper.label: Offer 03
offer.kamper.title: Camper Site
offer.kamper.lead: Your spot in Masuria. Peace, nature, and electricity at every pitch.
offer.kamper.feat2: Access to water and sanitary facilities
compare.label: Not sure what to pick?
pricing.label: Pricing & terms
pricing.desc: Price depends on season and number of guests. Indicative ranges below — exact quote after contact.
pricing.note: No prices visible? Custom quote — contact us, we reply within hours.
availability.label: Availability
availability.desc: Choose your dates and contact us directly.
benefits.label: Why book here
benefits.b1.title: Three ponds outside your window
benefits.b1.text: Private ponds with piers, fishing from the terrace, kayak whenever. Lake Olecko Małe — wild and intimate — just next door.
benefits.b2.title: 8 hectares — everyone has space
benefits.b2.text: Even when other guests are here, you won't feel it. Hammocks, campfire, BBQ — everyone finds their own corner.
benefits.b3.title: Kayaks and bikes included
benefits.b3.text: No rental fees. Take the kayak when you feel like it, come back when you want.
benefits.b4.title: Pets — welcome
benefits.b4.text: We have a flexible attitude towards pets. Please arrange in advance.
benefits.b5.title: Konrad — a host with heart
benefits.b5.text: 4.9/5 · over 300 Google reviews. An exceptional host creates an exceptional place.
directions.label: How to get here
directions.desc: Siedlisko Konradówka is at Kukowo 33A — a small Masurian village (German: Reinkental) full of poppy fields and cornflowers. Easy to reach from anywhere in Poland.

footer.tagline: Your refuge in the heart of Masurian nature.

page.chaty.hero.title: Konradowe
page.chaty.hero.sub: Two-story 75 sqm wooden cottages with fireplace, terrace and direct water access.
page.chaty.label: Konradowe Cottages · Kukowo
page.chaty.h2: Wooden cottage with fireplace by the water
page.chaty.sub: Exclusive 75 sqm two-story cottages — terrace, pond, silence.
page.chaty.p1: Each cottage has a living room with fireplace, fully equipped kitchenette, two bedrooms plus a sofa bed (up to 6 people). Bathroom with shower, Wi-Fi, TV. Roofed terrace overlooking the water.
page.chaty.p2: Kayaks and bikes are included in the price. Fishing from the pier or kayak — three private ponds. Sauna available for guests.
page.chaty.nearby.p: Stańczyki Viaducts (25 km), Lake Hańcza (45 km), Wigry National Park (50 km), Suwalki Landscape Park.
page.chaty.faq.a1: Pets are accepted by prior arrangement — please contact us before booking.
page.chaty.faq.a2: Yes — fireplace + electric heating. Firewood is included in the price outside peak season.
page.chaty.faq.a3: Wi-Fi included. Stable 4G coverage for major carriers.
page.chaty.faq.a4: Check-in from 15:00, check-out by 11:00. Individual arrangements possible.
page.chaty.faq.q5: How many people can the cottage accommodate?
page.chaty.faq.a5: The cottage has 2 bedrooms and a sofa bed — up to 6 people comfortably.
page.kamper.hero.title: Camper Site
page.kamper.hero.sub: 230V electricity, water, silence and genuine Masurian nature.
page.kamper.label: Camper Site · Kukowo
page.kamper.h2: A peaceful spot for your motorhome
page.kamper.sub: Separate pitches with 230V electricity, in the heart of Masurian nature.
page.kamper.p1: Park up, set up your chairs, brew your coffee. The Masurian morning is yours. Each pitch has a 230V hook-up and water access. Shower facilities on site.
page.kamper.p2: Kayaks and bikes included in the price. Fishing in three private ponds. Sauna available for guests. Children's playground with trampolines.
page.kamper.nearby.p: Stańczyki Viaducts 25 km, Lake Hańcza 45 km, Wigry National Park 50 km, Suwałki 48 km.
page.kamper.faq.a1: Motorhomes, caravans and tents. Pitches are large enough for full-size motorhomes.
page.kamper.faq.a2: Yes — 230V, standard European connector. Just plug in.
page.kamper.faq.a3: Yes — hot showers and toilets on site.
page.kamper.faq.a4: Low season from 80 PLN/night, high season (Jul–Aug) from 110 PLN. Per pitch. Pets by arrangement.
page.kamper.faq.q5: Can I stay longer than a week?
page.kamper.faq.a5: Of course. We offer better rates for stays of 7+ days — contact us.
page.stajnia.hero.title: Studios in the
page.stajnia.hero.sub: Atmospheric apartments in a restored stable — history meets comfort.
page.stajnia.label: Studios in the Old Stable · Kukowo
page.stajnia.h2: Atmospheric studios in the heart of the homestead
page.stajnia.sub: Two-story 45 sqm studios in a restored stable — original wood, modern comfort.
page.stajnia.p1: The Old Stable is a building with soul — restored with care for the original wooden beams and brick walls. Inside: modern bathroom, fully equipped kitchenette, comfortable beds.
page.stajnia.nearby.p: Atmospheric dinner, walk around the pond, evening on the terrace. Stańczyki 25 km, Hańcza 45 km, Wigry 50 km.
page.stajnia.faq.q1: What is the difference between studio types?
page.stajnia.faq.a1: Studio 3–4 — large, family. Studio 4 (type 4) — modern, 4 people. Double room — intimate, for couples.
page.stajnia.faq.a2: Yes — every studio has a fridge, hob, kettle and basic kitchenware.
page.stajnia.faq.a3: Pets by prior arrangement — please contact us before booking.
page.stajnia.faq.a5: Check-in from 15:00, check-out by 11:00. Individual arrangements possible.

inquiry.trust2.title: Direct reservation
intro.p1: Three types of stay in one place: wooden cottages with fireplace, atmospheric studios in a restored stable and a camper site. Kayaks and bikes included. Fishing from the terrace.
offer.chaty.feat.sub: Two-story 75 sqm wooden cottages with fireplace, terrace and direct pond access.
offer.stajnia.feat.sub: Two-story 45 sqm studios in a restored stable — original wood, intimate atmosphere.
offer.kamper.feat.sub: Your spot in Masuria with 230V electricity.
founder.lead: Siedlisko Konradówka is my life. I built it piece by piece, with people in mind who need real rest — not another hotel.
founder.p1: Kukowo is a small village in the Masurian Hills. Fields of poppies and cornflowers, forests, three private ponds, silence at dawn. The place where the road ends — and peace begins.
founder.p2: Every guest gets my phone number. Questions about dates, local attractions, best fishing spots — I'll reply or call back. That's how I work.
founder.quote: An exceptional host creates an exceptional place.
review.q1: "The grounds are spacious, surrounded by forest, quiet and peaceful. Even when there are many guests, you simply don't feel it — everyone finds their own space."
review.q2: "A wonderful place. Very friendly and welcoming hosts. They've created something truly special — cottages in the old style, small and large ponds, kayaks, fish. Something for everyone."
review.q3: "A wonderful place for a couple's getaway — beautiful natural surroundings, well-kept cosy cottages, wonderful owners. The homestead offers the privacy that allows you to truly unwind."
forkogo.pairs.desc: Stylish studios in the Old Stable or cottages with fireplace, lanterns after dark, silence. No entertainment director, no neighbours through the wall.
forkogo.families.desc: Fenced grounds, trampolines, three ponds with piers. Safe space where children run for hours while adults finally rest.
forkogo.anglers.desc: Three private ponds full of fish. Fishing from the pier, cottage terrace or kayak. Silence and sunrise over the water.
forkogo.campers.desc: 230V electricity at every pitch, water, shower facilities. Quiet, green space far from overcrowded car parks.
forkogo.active.desc: Kayaks and bikes included. Routes through the Masurian Hills and Suwałki Region start right at the gate.
forkogo.groups.desc: Multiple cottages, shared campfire, BBQ, hammocks. Enough space to be together and to have your own corner.
forkogo.label: Find yourself
forkogo.desc: Everyone finds their place here. Literally — 8 hectares is a lot of space.
forkogo.pairs.title: Couples & romance

story.label: The homestead speaks
story.moment1.title: Arrival.
story.moment1.text: You arrive, the engine falls silent. Wooden cottages in old Prussian style, the smell of the forest, stillness. You know at once — this is the place.
story.moment2.title: A pastoral afternoon.
story.moment2.text: Colourful hammocks, wooden benches under the canopy, sun through the leaves. Nothing to do. Nowhere to be.
story.moment3.title: Dawn over the pond.
story.moment3.text: Every sunrise paints the panorama differently. Mist on the water, birdsong, coffee on the terrace. This is not found in any hotel.
story.moment4.title: Remarkable interiors.
story.moment4.text: Natural materials, old wood, warm light. In every cottage, time slows — even just for a moment by the fireplace.
story.poppies.caption: Kukowo in summer.

ig.followCopy: See our daily frames — we celebrate every season.
faq.label: Got questions?
faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.a1: Stays with pets are always arranged individually. Tell us about your companion in the reservation form and we'll work something out together.
faq.a2: Check-in from 3:00 PM, check-out by 11:00 AM. We meet in person, show you around and tell you about the area. Late check-in can be arranged by phone.
faq.q3: Does the cottage have heating in winter?
faq.a3: Yes. Every cottage has both a fireplace and electric heating. In the low season (October to April), firewood is included. It's the most atmospheric time of year to stay here.
faq.a4: Wi-Fi works in the cottages and the stable. 4G coverage is stable across all major operators. Working remotely? No problem.
